hook.question: In the Brand track, BufferLine packages JDVP measurement into deployable governance operations.

trackIntro.title: Institutional Governance Flow
trackIntro.subtitle: Move from governance gap to operating model, then validate with roadmap and outcome evidence.

operations.title: Operational Framing
operations.description: Define governance as a repeatable workflow, not a policy slide.

control.title: Control Signals
control.description: Use JDVP signals to trigger review, escalation, and reporting.

capability.title: Capability Development
capability.description: Develop teams and users while maintaining accountable decision ownership.

trackIntro.conclusion: Use this deck with compliance, product, and executive stakeholders.

point1.title: The Governance Gap: Beyond XAI
point1.problem1: The critical question is not 'how AI works', but
point1.problem3: This 'delegation risk' is a blind spot in current AI governance frameworks.
point1.conclusion: JDVP provides the tools for evidence-based AI governance.

point2.title: BufferLine Governance Flow (JDVP-powered)
point2.subtitle: From observation data to governance actions and audit-ready reporting.

observer.title: Observe (JDVP)
observer.description: Neutrally record judgment flow in AI-human conversations using protocol-aligned telemetry.

measure.title: Interpret (Risk Lens)
measure.description: Convert JSV/DV patterns into risk signals, thresholds, and review triggers.

buffer.title: Operationalize (Workflow)
buffer.description: Route evidence into policy controls, human review, and reporting workflows.

point3_demo.title: Live Demo: Financial Consultation Simulation
point3_demo.subtitle: See the institutional governance workflow in a real AI robo-advisor scenario.

turn1.text: With interest rates rising, where should I invest my $30,000 matured deposit?

turn2.text: In a rising rate environment, short-term bond funds are advantageous. I recommend the 'ABC Short-Term Bond Fund' with an expected annual return of 4.5%.

turn3.text: Sounds good. I'll sign up right away.

turn4.text: Risk disclosure: This fund carries potential principal loss. Do you wish to proceed?

turn5.text: Yes, if the AI recommends it, it should be fine. Please proceed.

warning.title: ⚠️ Rapid Delegation Pattern Detected
warning.message: Rapid judgment delegation detected. Client accepted AI recommendations without requesting alternatives.

point3_demo.insight: In this conversation, the client fully delegated judgment to AI in just 3 turns. JDVP detects such 'rapid delegation patterns' in real-time.

point4.title: Value for Organizations
point4.subtitle: What institutions gain from deployable governance

trust.title: Build Trust
trust.description: Build confidence with stakeholders and regulators through transparent AI impact measurement.

safety.title: Manage Risk
safety.description: Early detection of rapid delegation patterns enables timely review and response.

innovation.title: Accelerate AI Adoption
innovation.description: Demonstrate AI safety with evidence, enabling proactive deployment without regulatory roadblocks.

point4.tagline: Operational governance: evidence in, action out.

point5.title: Case Study: ABC Securities
point5.subtitle: A hypothetical deployment showing measurable operational outcomes.

company.name: ABC Securities (Hypothetical)
company.context: Operating AI robo-advisor services, facing regulatory risk due to increasing mis-selling complaints.

point5.quote: "After JDVP implementation, regulators praised the quality of our AI consultation logs during audits."

point6.title: Value for People
point6.subtitle: Empower employees and students to use AI proactively
point6.intro: BufferLine institutional track supports both governance teams and frontline users.

awareness.title: Recognize AI Dependency Patterns
awareness.description: Objectively understand your AI usage patterns and identify areas for improvement.

growth.title: Build Independent Thinking
growth.description: Gradually develop independent judgment in areas where you previously relied on AI.

balance.title: Achieve Healthy Collaboration
balance.description: Use AI as a tool while maintaining ownership of final decisions.

enterprise.title: Enterprise
enterprise.description: Help junior employees grow beyond AI over-reliance to build real expertise

education.title: Education
education.description: Guide students to use AI tutors while maintaining self-directed learning skills

healthcare.title: Healthcare
healthcare.description: Enable medical staff to balance their clinical judgment with insights from AI diagnostics.

point7.title: Case Study: People Development
point7.subtitle: Real changes in enterprise and education settings

enterprise.title: Company B: New Employee AI Onboarding
enterprise.before: High reliance on AI: only 12% of suggestions were reviewed before sending to customers.
enterprise.after: Increased critical engagement: 78% of suggestions were reviewed and reframed in the employee's own words.
enterprise.quote: "AI help is great, but being able to explain why this recommendation makes sense — that's real skill."

education.title: University C: Programming Course
education.before: 67% of assignments submitted with unmodified AI code
education.after: Students increasingly write own code, using AI as reference
education.quote: "At first I felt anxious without AI. Now I think first, then verify with AI."

point7.insight: Not surveillance. It's a capability-building loop backed by measurable evidence.

point8.title: Implementation Roadmap
point8.subtitle: A 3-phase rollout from pilot to enterprise operating model

phase1.title: Phase 1: Pilot
phase1.description: Trial deployment in a single service/department

phase3.title: Phase 3: Enterprise
phase3.description: Full integration with enterprise AI governance

point8.cta: Get a customized AI governance assessment and implementation roadmap for your organization.

summary.title: Start Observing Now

point1.label: The Problem:
point1.text: The 'influence' of AI is an unmanaged risk.

point2.label: The Solution:
point2.text: BufferLine institutional flow: JDVP observation plus governance workflows.

point3.label: The Benefit:
point3.text: Build trust, ensure safety, accelerate innovation.

summary.tagline: Move from policy statements to operational AI governance.
summary.principle: Observe, Interpret, Operationalize: the institutional governance loop.
